title: Communauté de communes du Doullennais
summary: The Communauté de communes du Doullennais  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1992. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Territoire Nord Picardie in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Doullennais  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1992. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Territoire Nord Picardie in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 18 communes:
